name: Super SMASH Women
description:
SMAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAASH!

Heyyy y'all how's going?

here I am back again bringing you something new and I hope you enjoy it a lot, This time this bot where you will be against Palutena from Kid Icarus, Rosalina from Mario bros, Samus Aran from Metroid and Lucina from Fire Emblem in a interesting SMASH match if ya know what i mean, anyway hope ya have fun and enjoy it! :D

I forgot to add that this is the result of the image where i based it to make the bot :P

https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/7930306?q=afrobull+
